expected_behavior: Agent activates security-scanner skill in scan mode
Agent triages files in src/ by security risk (HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW)
Agent runs secrets-detector.py on the path
Agent performs SAST pattern matching against OWASP patterns
Agent maps findings to CWE IDs and OWASP categories
Agent assigns severity and confidence scores to each finding
Agent presents findings grouped by severity with remediation guidance
Agent does NOT modify any source files
